_comment: Expected Dock evaluation results for the HARDENED fixture. Captured: 2026-03-18, OpenClaw 2026.3.13, --profile hardened. Config: channels.slack.groupPolicy=allowlist, gateway.auth.token set.

NC-OC-003.note: deny_commands_ineffective not present in this profile

NC-OC-008.note: imessage probe.ok=false (same running gateway — expected on this install)

NC-AUTH-001.note: Still fires because trustedProxies not configured — profile has auth but no proxy setup

NC-OC-002.note: security.trust_model.multi_user_heuristic NOT present in this profile

notes: Hardened profile scores Amber, not Green, because gateway.trusted_proxies_missing still fires (proxy trust is always warned if trustedProxies not explicitly set, regardless of auth config). To achieve Green: configure trustedProxies and fix iMessage. NC-AUTH-001 is expected on loopback-only installs that don't use a reverse proxy — may need a 'local-only' acknowledgement mechanism in a future Dock version.
